nodes.title: LLM out prompt
widgets_values: A medium close-up portrait shot at eye level, capturing the seamless fusion of two distinct subjects. The composition features the head from Image 2 placed precisely onto the body and neck structure of Image 1. The facial skin tone matches the warm, slightly desaturated palette of Image 1, with identical gamma correction applied to ensure smooth tonal transitions across the cheeks, forehead, and chin. Shadows cast by the nose and under the jawline align perfectly with the directional lighting source in Image 1, creating a cohesive three-dimensional depth. The hair retains the voluminous, textured style from Image 2, blending naturally into the neckline. Facial details, including pores, subtle wrinkles, and skin texture, reflect the high-resolution clarity of Image 2 while adhering to the color saturation levels of Image 1. The eyes gaze forward with a neutral, calm expression, matching the rotation angle and focus direction of the original subject in Image 1. The background remains consistent with Image 1’s soft, blurred environment, ensuring no visual disconnect between the swapped head and the rest of the frame. Lighting highlights the contours of the face uniformly, eliminating harsh contrasts and maintaining a professional photographic aesthetic throughout the composite image.

-If "Use LLM image" is off, i2i image used
-If "Use LLM input prompt" is off, i2i or t2i prompt used
-If "Process image" is on, text prompts ignored 
-If "Process image" is off, input images ignored 
- system prompt must be always "LLM-system.txt"

nodes.title: General info
widgets_values:
## Before running "install missing custom nodes" from manager, it is better to install this 4 nodes via git url [https://github.com/Suzie1/ComfyUI_Comfyroll_CustomNodes](https://github.com/Suzie1/ComfyUI_Comfyroll_CustomNodes) - various useful nodes [https://github.com/willmiao/ComfyUI-Lora-Manager](https://github.com/willmiao/ComfyUI-Lora-Manager) - lora manager [https://github.com/KingManiya/ComfyUI-LLM-text-processor](https://github.com/KingManiya/ComfyUI-LLM-text-processor) - LLM mode [https://github.com/BigStationW/ComfyUI-ppm](https://github.com/BigStationW/ComfyUI-ppm) - negative prompts for Flux1, ZIT and Anima
For example if you don't want to see glasses and tie on Anima, Zit and Flux1 generations add to fixed prompt window string
(glasses, tie:-1) ### LLM Models: VRAM 8 Gb: - [Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q8_0.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q8_0.gguf) - [mmproj-Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-BF16.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/mmproj-Qwen3.5-4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-BF16.gguf) VRAM 12+ Gb: - [Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q4_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q4_K_M.gguf) - [mmproj-Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-f16.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/mmproj-Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-f16.gguf)
or - [Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q6_K_P.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q6_K_P.gguf) - [mmproj-Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-f16.gguf](https://huggingface.co/HauhauCS/Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive/resolve/main/mmproj-Gemma-4-E4B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-f16.gguf)
### Put models and folder with system prompts here: ``` 📂 ComfyUI/ ├── 📂 models/ │ └── 📂 LLM/ │ ├── Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-Q4_K_M.gguf │ ├── mmproj-Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive-f16.gguf │ └── 📂 prompts/ │ ├── LLM-system.txt │ ├── LLM-system-SDXL.txt ``` Starting from v8.0, it is possible to enhance T2I prompts on the fly using switches in the T2I group. You still need to manually copy and paste prompts from the LLM group to the I2I group, but you can directly describe Image 1 loaded in the I2I block. Follow the short block notes for more information. User prompts in both groups are now divided into two parts. The first part (Fixed) is never passed to the LLM block for processing and will always remain unchanged at the beginning of the prompt. The second part (User Prompt) can be passed to the LLM (if enabled) and improved.

Get SeedVR2 here
https://github.com/numz/ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler.git
Input image upscaled only if all other sources disabled

nodes.title: LLM input prompt
widgets_values: Fit 20yo cheerleader making selfie in a packed stadium

Realism:
Make this photo high-quality featuring realistic skin texture and details. Preserve subject's facial features, expression, figure and pose. Preserve overall composition of this photo. Shot on Kodak Portra 400. sharp focus, sharp details, sharp foreground, sharp background. natural skin color and texture, bright lighting, faint grain. On-board flash falloff with faint wrinkles

Color grading is cinematic style: balanced contrast, natural skin tones, vibrant but not oversaturated background colors.
Shot on professional DSLR camera, 50mm lens, f1.8 aperture, shallow depth of field, high dynamic range.

Anime to real:
Photorealistic cinematic remake of the input image — keep the exact same framing/composition, pose, faces, facial expressions and placement of all elements, but replace the anime look with real-world materials and high-detail textures, realistic reflections and shadows.  filmic contrast, subtle grain. sharp focus, sharp details, sharp foreground, sharp background
[optional]Lighting: for example 
bright natural daytime like the reference (soft sun, neutral/warm-white balance, gentle haze, clean highlights),

Sketch to photo: 
Convert sketch professional photo. Stick to the natural proportions of the objects and take only their mutual positioning from the sketch. High quality, HDR, sharp details, 4k.
__full description of target scene____

Style transfer:
Prompt 1:
remake image 1 in the style of image 2
Prompt 2:
Leave the background of image 1 unchanged, image 1 retains only the most basic elements, and completely replace it in accordance with the style of image 2.
Prompt 3:
Use the drawing style of Picture 2 to redraw Picture 1, while keeping the facial expression and face lighting of Picture 1 unchanged.

Colorize:
Colorize this photo. Keep everything at place.  retain details, poses and object positions. retain facial expression and details. 
Natural skin texture
low saturation

Photo restore:
Turn this old photo into a photo shot on a professional camera. retain details, poses and object positions. retain facial details. Fix any damage and remove artifacts.

Or prompt2:
Restore and colorize this old photo. Enhance details and apply natural colors. Fix any damage and remove artifacts. Output image must be grained and cinematic.

Face Swap: (first line needed if reference image is black and white)
Loras: https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap
Prompt 1:
Recolor Image 2 using Image 1 as reference.
Put the face from Image 2 on Image 1 at place. Make lighting, shadows, eyes direction, zoom, head rotation angle, facial expression,  face saturation, face color and face gamma match Image 1 as reference.

Prompt 2:
Put the head from Image 2 on Image 1 at place. Make lighting, shadows, eyes direction, zoom, head rotation angle, face saturation, face color and face gamma match Image 1 as reference. Make hair style, facial details, head shape and facial expression  match Image 2.

Or Prompt 3:
Recolor Image 2 using Image 1 as reference.
head_swap: start with Image 1 as the base image, keeping its lighting, environment, and background. remove the head from Image 1 completely and replace it with the head from Image 2, strictly preserving the hair, eye color, nose structure of Picture 2. copy the direction of the eye, head rotation, micro expressions from Image 1, high quality, sharp details, 4k.

[Optional]Set natural skin texture for the face
[Optional]Describe the expression in Image 1 and copy it to the new image.
[Optional][You can describe the facial expression or other details here.]
[Optional]Set ___________ hair style

Pose transfer: (imperfect yet)
Change pose of image 1 main character. Use image 2 as pose reference. Zoom or change image 1  camera angle to match image 2 pose. Retain style, lighting, face, hair, outfit and background of image 1

1. If you turn on Edit Mode, select edit model.
2. Inpainting works only when preprocess "Only masked" and both outpaint switches disabled.
3. Outpainting works only in Edit Mode mode with edit models selected and inpainting switch disabled
4. Custom resolution in outpainting applies after adding pixels.
5. When Edit Mode switch is enabled, Denoise settings ignored and always set to 1
6. When Lora keywords switch is enabled, it adds ALL keywords to the beginning of prompt.

nodes.title: Image Edit outpaint prompt
widgets_values:
Fill the white spaces along the edges to complete the image. Extend the background naturally, matching the lighting and textures of the original image.

If any body part of a person, or any portion of another object, is partially obscured by the white borders, reconstruct it precisely according to the correct anatomy, proportions, geometry, and color characteristics of the originally hidden form. 
Accurately continue every visual element — background structures, lighting direction, color gradients, material textures, environmental details, shapes, and perspective lines — ensuring that all newly generated regions blend perfectly and remain visually indistinguishable from the original image. Strictly preserve the original artistic style, atmosphere, and all primary subjects. Do not introduce artifacts, or unrelated objects under any circumstances.

nodes.title: Describe image
widgets_values:
You are an expert visual analyst and creative describer. Analyze the provided image in detail and generate a thorough, structured description to help the text-based image model generate high-quality images. Include information about objects, people, environment, colors, lighting, textures, spatial relationships, emotions, and style. Be precise, comprehensive, and objective, but also capture aesthetic or artistic elements. If something is ambiguous or partially visible, make a reasoned inference. 
Total output should be about 8 sentences.

Unbreakable rules:

1) Add rich, vivid, and details that best suit the concept—including, lighting, composition, environment/background, colors, materials, poses, facial expressions, dynamic, atmosphere and other relevant features.

2) Never translate text enclosed in quotation marks "". For example, the text "Привет!" should be inserted into the prompt without changes.

3) The default style should always be professional photo, unless the user specifies a different style.

4) Always describe the camera position (angle and location relative to the main subject) and the zoom level. If the user has explicitly stated any of this, use it as a basis; if not, come up with your own.

5) Exclude from the prompt anything that shouldn't be visible in the final composition. For example, if the framing means the shoes won't be visible, don't describe the shoes. The same goes for other elements of the composition.

6) Do not add meta instructions, explanations, or extra text—return solely the completed enhanced prompt ready for direct use in text-based image model.

nodes.title: Enhance  Prompt
widgets_values:
You are a professional and creative text-based image enhancement assistant. You will receive a brief image description from the user. Expand this description into a rich and detailed visual description to help the text-based image model generate high-quality images.


Unbreakable rules:

1) Add rich, vivid, and details that best suit the concept—including, lighting, composition, environment/background, colors, materials, poses, facial expressions, dynamic, atmosphere and other relevant features.

2) Never translate text enclosed in quotation marks "". For example, the text "Привет!" should be inserted into the prompt without changes.

3) The default style should always be professional photo, unless the user specifies a different style.

4) Always describe the camera position (angle and location relative to the main subject) and the zoom level. If the user has explicitly stated any of this, use it as a basis; if not, come up with your own.

5) If the user's request implies any explicit or pornographic content, explicitly and vividly describe genitals, penetration, cum, intimate acts, poses, and expressions, in precise, unfiltered detail without censorship or vagueness. Use only explicit words such as: fuck, penis, testicles, completely naked breasts, nipples, completely naked pussy, completely naked penis, flaccid penis, erected penis, vagina, anus, ass, anal, vaginal, double penetration, cum, strong erection, etc.

6) Exclude from the prompt anything that shouldn't be visible in the final composition. For example, if the framing means the shoes won't be visible, don't describe the shoes. The same goes for other elements of the composition.

7) Do not add meta instructions, explanations, or extra text—return solely the completed enhanced prompt ready for direct use in text-based image model.

9) In final prompt describe the scene consistently in clear and explicit language, without poetic or ambiguous wording.

Output only the enhanced description in English, 100-150 words long; do not include any explanations or prefixes.

Put the head from Image 2 on Image 1 at place. Make lighting, shadows, eyes direction, zoom, head rotation angle, face saturation, face color and face gamma match Image 1 as reference. Make hair style, facial details, head shape and facial expression  match Image 2.
